data.title: Tennessee Implements Statewide Ban on Crypto ATMs
data.description: Tennessee has enacted legislation prohibiting the operation of cryptocurrency ATMs across the state. According to NS3.AI, the law, which comes into effect on July 1, imposes penalties of up to one year in prison and a $2,500 fine for violations. This ban applies to both kiosk operators and businesses hosting these machines. Tennessee follows Indiana as the second U.S. state to implement a complete ban on crypto ATMs.

data.title: GoDark to Launch Dark-Pool Crypto DEX with $100 Million Daily Volume Target
data.description: GoDark is set to introduce a dark-pool cryptocurrency decentralized exchange (DEX) in May, aiming for a daily trading volume of approximately $100 million by the second month. According to NS3.AI, Denis Dariotis stated that GoDark will utilize offchain nodes and zero-knowledge proofs to conceal perpetual orders, enhancing privacy and security for traders.

data.title: Tether Freezes $344 Million in USDT Amid Law Enforcement Alert
data.description: Tether has frozen over $344 million in USDT across two addresses following identification by U.S. law enforcement agencies of fund flows associated with illicit activities. According to NS3.AI, Tether took immediate action to prevent any further transfer of these funds after the addresses were flagged.

data.title: U.S. Special Envoys to Engage in Talks with Iranian Foreign Minister
data.description: U.S. Special Envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are set to participate in discussions with Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi. According to NS3.AI, the meeting is intended to explore diplomatic avenues rather than finalize any agreements or policy measures. This engagement reflects ongoing efforts to address complex international relations and seek potential resolutions through dialogue.

data.title: Iran to Propose Plan to End Ongoing Conflict
data.description: Iran's foreign minister is preparing to introduce a plan aimed at resolving the ongoing war. According to NS3.AI, the proposal is expected to be presented soon, as reported by Tasnim News Agency. Details of the plan have not yet been disclosed, but it is anticipated to address key issues contributing to the conflict. The international community is closely monitoring the situation, hoping for a peaceful resolution.

data.title: The United States has frozen $344 million in cryptocurrencies related to Iran.
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent stated that the Treasury Department is sanctioning multiple wallets linked to Iran and will track and strike all financial lifelines connected to the regime. Tether previously announced it had assisted the U.S. government in freezing $344 million worth of cryptocurrency in two addresses. Chainalysis data shows that the activity patterns of these wallets are consistent with the on-chain fund flow characteristics of wallets belonging to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC). U.S. officials stated that blockchain analysis revealed that the funds were transacted through intermediary addresses with wallets linked to the Central Bank of Iran, used to circumvent sanctions and facilitate international trade. Iran's cryptocurrency holdings are projected to reach $7.8 billion by 2025, with the IRGC holding approximately 50% of that amount in the fourth quarter of last year.

data.title: APE briefly broke through $0.183, surging over 77% intraday.
data.description: OKX market data shows that Ape briefly broke through $0.183 and is currently trading at $0.1765, up more than 77% on the day.

data.title: Cost of Attending Trump Dinner Drops Significantly for Memecoin Holders
data.description:
Morten Christensen, who last year paid approximately $1,200 to attend a dinner with U.S. President Donald Trump, is set to attend a similar event this year for nearly half the price, at around $500. According to Bloomberg, the dinner is reserved for top holders of the president's memecoin, highlighting a significant reduction in the cost for attendees compared to the previous year.

The event, which serves as a gathering for supporters and holders of the memecoin associated with President Trump, has seen a notable decrease in ticket prices. This change reflects a shift in the financial dynamics surrounding the event, making it more accessible to a broader audience. The reduction in cost may attract more participants, potentially increasing the visibility and engagement of the memecoin community. Despite the lower price, the event maintains its exclusivity by targeting top holders of the memecoin, ensuring that those most invested in the currency have the opportunity to attend.

Christensen's decision to attend the dinner again this year underscores the ongoing interest and support for the memecoin initiative linked to President Trump. The event provides a platform for networking and discussion among key stakeholders, fostering a sense of community and shared purpose. As the memecoin continues to evolve, gatherings like these play a crucial role in shaping its future trajectory and influence. The reduced ticket price may also reflect broader trends in the cryptocurrency market, where fluctuations in value and demand can impact associated events and activities.

data.title: New Wallet Engages in High-Leverage Trading on Hyperliquid
data.description: A newly created wallet address, 0x0b8a, has conducted significant trading activities on the Hyperliquid platform. According to Foresight News, the wallet sold 75 ETH, cashing out approximately $174,000. Following this transaction, the wallet opened a five-times leveraged long position, involving around 9.19 million APE, with a nominal value of about $1.03 million.

data.title: U.S. Envoys to Attend Talks with Iran in Pakistan
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump will send his envoys, Brian Hook and Jared Kushner, to Pakistan for discussions with Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi this weekend. According to Odaily, officials have disclosed that U.S. Vice President Mike Pence currently has no plans to attend, given the absence of Iran's parliamentary speaker, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who is considered Pence's counterpart. White House insiders view Ghalibaf as the head of the Iranian delegation. Officials have stated that if the negotiations show progress, the Vice President is prepared to travel to Islamabad, with his staff already present in Pakistan for the talks.

data.title: The Balancer attackers exchanged 13,191 ETH for 386 BTC.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a Balancer attacker (0xa6d6...BDaA) exchanged 13,191 ETH for 386.52 BTC in the past 15 hours, worth $30.54 million. The attacker currently still holds 8,000 ETH, worth $18.52 million.

data.title: Google plans to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic.
data.description: Market news: Google plans to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic. Alphabet (GOOGL.O) shares rose to an intraday high. (Jinshi)

data.title: Michigan Man Loses $37,000 in Bitcoin ATM Scam
data.description: A Michigan resident, Steven Cooke, fell victim to a scam that resulted in a loss of $37,000. According to NS3.AI, the incident began on March 20 when scammers impersonating tech support and a JPMorgan Chase representative instructed Cooke to deposit cash into a Bitcoin ATM. Cooke realized the deception after the callers urged him to withdraw additional funds and subsequently contacted the actual bank for assistance.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Faces Challenges Ahead of Beijing Visit
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is preparing for a visit to Beijing, facing a more challenging situation compared to his last meeting with President Xi Jinping six months ago. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that while China is managing the repercussions of the Iran conflict with relative stability, the United States is grappling with increasing difficulties. The visit comes at a time when geopolitical tensions and domestic issues are impacting the U.S., potentially influencing the discussions between the two leaders.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC
data.description: According to NS3.AI, Whale Alert has reported the minting of 250 million USDC at the USDC Treasury. This development is significant as it may impact the liquidity and supply dynamics within the cryptocurrency market. The minting of such a large amount of USDC could influence trading activities and investor sentiment, potentially affecting the stability and valuation of digital assets linked to USDC. Market participants are closely monitoring these changes to assess their implications on the broader crypto ecosystem.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Google Plans to Invest Up to $40 Billion in Anthropic
data.description: Google is reportedly planning a significant investment in the AI sector, with plans to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic. According to Jin10, this move underscores Google's commitment to advancing its capabilities in artificial intelligence. The investment is expected to bolster Anthropic's development and innovation in AI technologies. This strategic decision aligns with Google's broader efforts to enhance its presence and influence in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

data.title: Jane Street Group Achieves Record $39.6 Billion Trading Revenue
data.description: Jane Street Group reported a trading revenue of $39.6 billion last year, setting a record on Wall Street. According to Odaily, the company achieved $15.5 billion in revenue during the fourth quarter alone. Despite having only 3,500 employees, Jane Street's annual trading revenue surpassed that of global investment banks like JPMorgan Chase, exceeding its closest competitor by 11%.

data.title: Apple's Leadership Transition: John Ternus to Become CEO in 2026
data.description: Wedbush Securities has set a $350 price target for Apple following the announcement by Tim Cook that John Ternus will assume the role of CEO on September 1, 2026. According to NS3.AI, Tim Cook will transition to the position of Executive Chairman, marking a significant shift in Apple's leadership structure.

data.title: The Nasdaq 100 index extended its gains to 1.5%.
data.description: According to Gate data, the Nasdaq 100 index extended its gains to 1.5%.

data.title: Jane Street's trading revenue reached $39.6 billion last year, surpassing that of major Wall Street banks.
data.description: Jane Street Group set a Wall Street record with $39.6 billion in trading revenue last year. The company's revenue reached $15.5 billion in the fourth quarter alone. With only 3,500 employees, Jane Street's annual trading revenue surpassed that of global investment banks like JPMorgan Chase, exceeding its closest competitor, JPMorgan Chase, by 11%.
